title: Collapsible Dog Bowl in Grey Colour, 705ml Silicone Water Bowl for Dogs, Perfect Camping Accessories, Pet Feeding Bowls for Walking and Travelling
features: Collapsible Dog Bowl – Travel-Friendly Design: Includes 1x Grey Silicone Dog Bowl, ideal for dog walking, hiking, camping, and road trips. Designed for small, medium, and large dogs, cats, and other pets on the go.
Large Capacity & Compact Size: Size: 24.5cm x 12.5cm x 6.5cm, collapses to 3.5cm for easy storage. Holds up to 705ml of food or water, making it perfect for travel.
High-Quality & Safe Material: Made from premium food-grade silicone, BPA-free, non-toxic, and eco-friendly. Durable, leak-proof, and dishwasher-safe for easy cleaning.
Lightweight & Portable: Collapsible and easy to store in backpacks, handbags, or car compartments. Comes with a buckle clip to attach to dog leash, belt loop, or backpack for hands-free carrying.
Multi-Purpose & Versatile: Perfect for dog food, water, and pet treats while traveling. Can also be used as a foldable kitchen container for fruits and vegetables.
description: PET FEEDING ACCESSORY TRAVELLING BOWL:- Collapsible Pet Bowls are constructed from High quality food grade silicone that can 'pop' out when required. The pet bowl is perfect for dogs or cats and ideal for on the go, camping, hiking, holidays and more. Complete with heart shaped cut outs on the handle. Comes with a buckle, convenient to be attached to dog leash, backpack, belt loop for walking, travelling and hiking. Safe and friendly to your pets. Let your fur friends eat more healthily! This foldable bowl also can be used as kitchen essentials. SPECIFICATIONS:- Dimensions: 24.5cm x 6.5cm (LxH) 3.5cm H when folded Capacity: 705ml Material: Silicone Colour: Grey Quantity: 1 FEATURES:- High quality silicone Safe and healthy for your pet Food Grade Material Easy to use, for both feeding and drinking Convenient to carry while travelling Perfect for camping, hiking and walking Bright colours Easy to clean, dishwasher safe Can be Used for a Long Time SATISFACTION GUARANTEED:- Your satisfaction is our first priority, customer service always stands by for you to provide 100% satisfied service. If you are not happy with these products for any reason feel free to contact us.
